decisions.brief_reason: The failed roadmap validator is a release gate, so the build remains blocked until the public pointer is corrected.
The accepted contract authorizes local editing but does not authorize publication.
Provenance and utility records cannot support cohort admission without a usable rights basis.
A weights-only checkpoint cannot restore the full training state or its recorded descendants.
Threshold crossing cannot be accepted without attributable evaluation and contamination controls.
The ready designation is inadmissible while a recorded defeater remains unanswered.
